description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large windows, a double-door entryway, and a small landscaped area with shrubs and a blossoming tree. The exterior combines white and dark blue-gray finishes, with the rear and side elevations showcasing expansive glass doors that open onto a patio and backyard. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a driveway leading to the main entrance. The backyard is landscaped with grass, trees, and a paved seating area, providing ample outdoor living space. The overall design emphasizes open, airy interiors and strong connections between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and dark blue-gray exterior finishes, set within a fenced yard with landscaped gardens and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, large windows, driveway, and landscaped front yard with a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dark blue-gray facade, long horizontal windows, backyard patio with seating, and landscaped garden along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass doors opening to a wooden deck, fenced backyard, and a clear view of the flat roof and upper story windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, garden beds, and the transition between the white and blue-gray exterior finishes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and horizontal strips
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with large glass panels, minimal steps, and a landscaped approach with shrubs and a blossoming tree
